transactions.desc: The Cleveland Guardians traded OF Nolan Jones to the Chicago White Sox.
Jones and cash considerations were dealt from the Guardians to the White Sox in return for international pool money Thursday.
The Philadelphia Phillies traded OF Dylan Campbell to the Chicago White Sox.
The Chicago White Sox traded OF Derek Hill to the Philadelphia Phillies.
The Philadelphia Phillies traded INF Jose Colmenares to the Chicago White Sox.
The Tigers claimed Outman off waivers from the Twins on Thursday.
The White Sox activated Pereira (pectoral) from the 10-day injured list Thursday.
The Dodgers selected Robinson's contract from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Thursday.
The Guardians optioned Heuer to Triple-A Columbus on Thursday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Mariners designated Gonzalez for assignment Thursday.
The Mariners selected Rucker's contract from Triple-A Tacoma on Thursday.
The Yankees activated Chivilli (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre.
The Pirates recalled Valdez from Triple-A Indianapolis on Thursday.
The Pirates optioned Wendzel to Triple-A Indianapolis on Thursday.
The Rangers recalled Curvelo from Triple-A Round Rock on Thursday.
The Astros optioned Whitcomb to Triple-A Sugar Land on Thursday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Mets recalled Duarte from Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
The Mets optioned Pintaro to Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
The Milwaukee Brewers traded RHP Jacob Waguespack to the Detroit Tigers.
The Angels selected Porter's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Cook from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Blue Jays designated Seabold for assignment Wednesday.
The Royals recalled Misner from Triple-A Omaha on Wednesday.
The Mariners optioned Bliss to Triple-A Tacoma on Wednesday.
The Mariners recalled Gonzalez from Triple-A Tacoma on Wednesday.
The Mariners activated Mastrobuoni (calf) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday.
The Blue Jays reinstated Scherzer (forearm/ankle) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday against the Phillies in Toronto.
The Tampa Bay Rays traded INF Raynel Delgado to the Houston Astros.
The White Sox recalled Murphy from Triple-A Charlotte on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Lara for assignment Wednesday.
